name: The Pot Grows
text:
Whenever you create one or more Treasure tokens, put a Pot counter on The Pot Grows.
{B}, Sacrifice The Pot Grows: You draw a card for each Pot counter on it and lose 1 life for each. Cash out while the cashing's good. (You won't.)
flavorText: The progressive jackpot has rolled over four hundred times. It will roll over forever.
